caption: A promotional screen for VirtualShield is displayed, featuring a woman with curly red hair and glasses looking at a laptop. The layout remains static across the sequence, presenting a dark-themed advertisement. The top left corner displays the VirtualShield logo. Prominent white text reads "Stay Home, Stay Protected." followed by "Extra 50% OFF" in a larger font. To the right, a large price tag shows "$2.50/month". Below the main headings is a block of smaller text discussing COVID-19 and the need for online security. A red button contains the text "Start Now for FREE", and a final line of text at the bottom instructs users to "Click the button above to claim your 50% discount!". The image is a composite of four identical frames, showing no movement or changes in the visuals, text, or the subject's expression throughout the clip.
